step_strike.name: Step Strike
step_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A rhythmic strike between movements. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Rhythm Pip.

graceful_entry.name: Graceful Entry
graceful_entry.description: Setup: Enter the battlefield with artistic form. Generates 2 Rhythm Pips and grants [Haste].

bladed_waltz.name: Bladed Waltz
bladed_waltz.description: Payoff/AOE: A lethal spinning dance. Consumes 5 Rhythm Pips to strike every enemy in the room twice.

pirouette_slam.name: Pirouette Slam
pirouette_slam.description: Payoff: A spinning vertical strike. Consumes 3 Rhythm Pips to deal Physical damage and apply [Staggered].

defensive_dance.name: Defensive Dance
defensive_dance.description: Defense: Focus on weaving through strikes. Increases Evasion by 40% for 6 ticks.

enchanting_sway.name: Enchanting Sway
enchanting_sway.description: Defense/Disruption: Entice your foe to make a mistake. Applies [Blinded] and [Dazed] for 2 ticks.

flourish_dash.name: Flourish Dash
flourish_dash.description: Mobility: Move across the battlefield in a blur of artistry.

finale_encore.name: Finale Encore
finale_encore.description: Utility/Signature: Your next 5 non-signature blessings can be repeated for 0 cost and no cooldown.

dancer_physiology.name: Dancer Physiology
dancer_physiology.description: Passive: Perfect Tempo. You gain 10% Critical chance and 20% bonus damage when attacking a target that was hit by an ally in the last 2 ticks.
